executiveSummary.text: GE Aerospace is one of the great industrial turnarounds of the decade. The 2025 FY results delivered record $6.4 EPS with total orders of $27B (+74% YoY), driven by commercial engine demand from Airbus and Boeing's production ramp. The LEAP engine continues to gain market share and the services business provides enormous recurring revenue. The spin-off to GE Vernova (energy) and GE HealthCare has left a cleaner, higher-quality business. At 37.9x P/E on record earnings, the valuation is premium — but the aerospace backlog is multi-decade in duration and the business has genuine pricing power. OPPORTUNISTIC BUY reflects the quality but acknowledges the stock is within 11% of its 52-week high, limiting the near-term upside and requiring patience for a better entry.
